message:
test(core): add 8 s55g conformance oracle tests for aggregate ORDER BY, rowid aliases, HAVING subquery, CTAS, datetime

Covers: ORDER BY COUNT(*) with unambiguous groups, correlated subquery in
SELECT with GROUP BY, UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT variations, rowid/_rowid_/oid
aliases, HAVING with subquery and nested aggregate, CREATE TABLE AS SELECT,
datetime/date/time/strftime/julianday, DELETE with correlated subquery WHERE.
All 100 s55 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
